bio_1: Dave Knowles is a South African composer and multi-instrumentalist whose work spans theatre, film, live electronic performance, and acoustic songwriting.

Drawing on violin, saxophone, guitar, and live looping technology, Dave creates layered sonic worlds that move between the intimate and the expansive — from solo acoustic sets under open skies to full-band productions for stage and screen.
Based in Cape Town and active across South Africa and Europe, Dave brings both technical precision and raw musical intuition to every project.

offer_1.title: DU!F Live Looping
offer_1.description: Immersive real-time composition using layered loops, violin, saxophone, and electronics.

offer_1.title: Acoustic Songwriting
offer_1.description: Intimate guitar and vocal performances — festival stages, private events, and sessions.

offer_1.title: Film & Theatre Scoring
offer_1.description: Original scores for screen and stage, from orchestral arrangements to electronic textures.

offer_1.title: Wedding & Event Music
offer_1.description: Tailored live music and DJ sets for ceremonies, receptions, and corporate events.
